items.promptRaw: 対向車とすれ違うさい、対向車が自車の走行する車線を一時占用しなければ走行できない場合どうすべきか。

items.promptTranslated: When passing an oncoming vehicle, what should you do if the oncoming car cannot pass unless it temporarily occupies your lane?
items.translatedPrompt: When passing an oncoming vehicle, what should you do if the oncoming car cannot pass unless it temporarily occupies your lane?
optionsTranslated: A. Pay attention not to occupy the oncoming lane and proceed as usual
B. Signal to the other vehicle, make it stop, and have it yield the way
C. Move to the right and accelerate through
D. Yield the way to the other vehicle
translatedOptions: A. Pay attention not to occupy the oncoming lane and proceed as usual
B. Signal to the other vehicle, make it stop, and have it yield the way
C. Move to the right and accelerate through
D. Yield the way to the other vehicle
items.correctAnswerTranslated: Yield the way to the other vehicle
items.translatedCorrectAnswer: Yield the way to the other vehicle

B 速度を落として後車に道を譲ろうとしている
C Uターンをしている
D 通常運転をしている
items.promptTranslated: In which situation are you not allowed to overtake the car in front that is driving in the same lane?
items.translatedPrompt: In which situation are you not allowed to overtake the car in front that is driving in the same lane?
optionsTranslated: A: When the car in front is about to stop
B: When it is slowing down to yield to the following car
C: When it is making a U-turn
D: When it is driving normally
translatedOptions: A: When the car in front is about to stop
B: When it is slowing down to yield to the following car
C: When it is making a U-turn
D: When it is driving normally

items.promptRaw: 道路中央の白い実線は、なにを示すか。
optionsRaw: A 対向車線の境界線を越えてはいけない
B 両側から同一方向車線の境界線を越えてよい
C 同一方向車道の境界線を越えてはいけない
D 片側から同一方向車道の境界線を越えてもよい
items.promptTranslated: What does the solid white line in the center of the road indicate?
items.translatedPrompt: What does the solid white line in the center of the road indicate?
optionsTranslated: A. You must not cross the boundary line into the oncoming lane.
B. The boundary line of a lane going the same direction can be crossed from both sides.
C. You must not cross the boundary line of a lane going the same direction.
D. The boundary line of a lane going the same direction can be crossed from one side.
translatedOptions: A. You must not cross the boundary line into the oncoming lane.
B. The boundary line of a lane going the same direction can be crossed from both sides.
C. You must not cross the boundary line of a lane going the same direction.
D. The boundary line of a lane going the same direction can be crossed from one side.

items.promptRaw: 虚偽の情報を提出し、運転免許の取得申請をした者はどの法律責任を負うか。
optionsRaw: A 20元以上200元以下の罰金を課す
B 運転免許取得を申請する資格が取り消される
C 1年間、運転免許取得を申請することができない
D 2年間、運転免許取得を申請することができない
items.correctAnswerRaw: 運転免許取得を申請する資格が取り消される
items.promptTranslated: What legal responsibility is borne by someone who submits false information in their application for a driver's license?
items.translatedPrompt: What legal responsibility is borne by someone who submits false information in their application for a driver's license?
optionsTranslated: A. A fine of between 20 and 200 yuan will be imposed
B. The qualification to apply for a driver's license will be revoked
C. Cannot apply for a driver's license for 1 year
D. Cannot apply for a driver's license for 2 years
translatedOptions: A. A fine of between 20 and 200 yuan will be imposed
B. The qualification to apply for a driver's license will be revoked
